Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a registered student player in the school sports and health management system, including personal details, physical measurements, and sport preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Player entity.

name.description: The full name of the player.

gender.description: The gender of the player, either Male or Female.

standard.description: The current academic standard (grade) of the player, typically from 1 to 12.

age.description: The calculated current age of the player based on their date of birth. This field is derivable.

bmi.description: The player's Body Mass Index (BMI), calculated from their height and weight. This field is derivable.

preferredSport.description: The primary sport the player prefers or is registered for.

hasSportHistory.description: Indicates whether the player has previous sport history.

sportHistoryDetails.description: Descriptive details about the player's past sport achievements or participation, if any.

medicalConditions.description: Information about any medical conditions, allergies, or emergency contact details relevant to the player's health.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Records the attendance status of a player for a specific date.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Attendance record.

playerId.description: Reference to the Player entity. (Relationship: Player 1:N Attendance)

attendanceDate.description: The specific date for which the attendance is recorded.

status.description: The attendance status of the player for the given date.

FitnessAssessment.title: FitnessAssessment
FitnessAssessment.description: Stores various fitness assessment scores and the derived fitness status for a player on a particular date.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Fitness Assessment record.

playerId.description: Reference to the Player entity. (Relationship: Player 1:N FitnessAssessment)

assessmentDate.description: The date when the fitness assessment was conducted.

flexibilityScore.description: The score obtained for the player's flexibility test.

enduranceScore.description: The score obtained for the player's endurance test.

overallScore.description: The aggregate or overall fitness score for the player.

status.description: The derived fitness status, e.g., 'Fit' or 'Need Training'.

SportSkill.title: SportSkill
SportSkill.description: Records specific skill descriptions and performance scores for a player in a particular sport.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Sport Skill record.

playerId.description: Reference to the Player entity. (Relationship: Player 1:N SportSkill)

sportName.description: The name of the sport to which these skills and scores pertain.

skillOneDescription.description: A description of the first specific skill evaluated for the player in this sport (e.g., 'spike' for volleyball).

skillTwoDescription.description: A description of the second specific skill evaluated for the player in this sport.

skillScore.description: The score achieved by the player for the specific skills in this sport.

lastUpdated.description: The timestamp indicating when this sport skill record was last updated or assessed.

HealthIncident.title: HealthIncident
HealthIncident.description: Documents health-related incidents, injuries, or ongoing medical events reported for a player.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Health Incident record.

playerId.description: Reference to the Player entity. (Relationship: Player 1:N HealthIncident)

incidentDate.description: The date when the health incident occurred or was reported.

description.description: A detailed description of the health incident, including symptoms, diagnosis, or actions taken.

definition.description: Stores individual player profiles, managed by authenticated school staff. The document ID (`playerId`) for each Player document MUST match its `id` field for consistent data references and simplified security rules. Includes denormalized 'age' and 'bmi' for quick access, calculated from 'dateOfBirth', 'heightCm', and 'weightKg'.

params.name: playerId
params.description: Unique identifier for the Player entity, also serving as the document ID.

definition.description: Records daily attendance for a specific player. This subcollection directly associates attendance records with their parent Player document. Each Attendance document includes a denormalized 'playerId' field, which MUST match the parent path's `{playerId}` for robust data integrity and simplified security rule validation.

params.name: playerId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent Player.

params.name: attendanceId
params.description: Unique identifier for an attendance record, often a date string or timestamp.

definition.description: Stores various fitness assessment scores and the derived fitness status for a player on a particular date. Each FitnessAssessment document includes a denormalized 'playerId' field, which MUST match the parent path's `{playerId}` for robust data integrity and simplified security rule validation.

params.name: playerId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent Player.

params.name: assessmentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the fitness assessment record.

definition.description: Records specific skill descriptions and performance scores for a player in a particular sport. Each SportSkill document includes a denormalized 'playerId' field, which MUST match the parent path's `{playerId}` for robust data integrity and simplified security rule validation.

params.name: playerId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent Player.

params.name: sportSkillId
params.description: Unique identifier for the sport skill record.

definition.description: Documents health-related incidents, injuries, or ongoing medical events reported for a player. Each HealthIncident document includes a denormalized 'playerId' field, which MUST match the parent path's `{playerId}` for robust data integrity and simplified security rule validation.

params.name: playerId
params.description: Unique identifier of the parent Player.

params.name: incidentId
params.description: Unique identifier for the health incident record.

definition.description: Grants 'staff' role to authenticated users. The existence of a document at this path (where `staffId` matches `request.auth.uid`) allows full read/write access to all player data and their subcollections. This collection adheres to the DBAC principle, using existence over content for role assignment, and is crucial for authorization independence.

params.name: staffId
params.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of a staff member.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for the Waghamba Sports Health Hub is designed to ensure secure, scalable, and debuggable data management, specifically addressing the user's concern about data loss from local storage.

**Core Design Decisions & Justification:**

1.  **Top-level Collections:**
    *   `players`: This is the central repository for all student player profiles. It's a top-level collection because player data is shared across the entire school and managed by any authorized staff member, rather than being
